---
title: "Test Student Report"
output: html_document
params:
  weekly_attendance: data.frame()
  emotion_trends: data.frame()
  concentration_trends: data.frame()
---

```{r}
# This will show if data is being passed
print("=== Weekly Attendance ===")
print(params$weekly_attendance)

print("=== Emotion Trends ===")
print(params$emotion_trends)

print("=== Concentration Trends ===")
print(params$concentration_trends)
